design_philosophy: Modern minimalist aesthetic inspired by Specialized.com. Tactical precision meets high-end sports gear. Deep obsidian backgrounds, electric orange accents, and bold condensed typography. The design emphasizes the quality and precision of 9mm FMJ bullets and reloaded ammunition. It feels premium, authoritative, and geared for high performance.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for section padding to give a premium feel.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The Tetris Grid for product categories (col-span-12 md:col-span-8 for main product, col-span-12 md:col-span-4 for secondary). Grid Borders (The Technical Look) for features.

surface_styles.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_styles.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. Hover: border-[#FF5500]/50, -translate-y-1 transition-transform
surface_styles.footer: Massive Space: py-24. Darker than surface, pure #000000 background with white/10 top border.

components_instructions.buttons: Sharp corners or max rounded-sm. Primary: bg-[#FF5500] text-white hover:bg-[#E64D00]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black. Uppercase text, tracking-wider.
components_instructions.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-[80vh]). Use left-aligned content. Background image overlaid with bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/60 to-transparent. Overlay must be heavy enough to ensure white text is perfectly readable.
components_instructions.navigation: Logo left, nav links center, CTA right. Desktop links must be visible, hover state text-white. Mobile uses hamburger menu.
components_instructions.product_grid: Bento box style, alternating large feature images and tight spec tables.
components_instructions.technical_specs: Use purely HTML/Tailwind grid with border-collapse, visible borders (border-white/10) to look like a tactical/engineering spec sheet.

hero_background.description: Dark abstract/metallic texture for hero background

manufacturing_history.description: High-end CNC manufacturing machine, precision engineering

contact_background.description: Dark workspace texture for contact section

brand_logo.url: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 400 100'><text x='10' y='75' font-family='sans-serif' font-weight='900' font-size='70' fill='%23FF5500'>ALSA<tspan fill='%23FFFFFF'>PRO</tspan></text></svg>

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive cards need border color shift to #FF5500 on hover. Buttons must have subtle scale (scale-105).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for hero text and images.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth scrolling momentum. Sticky header with backdrop-blur.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='nav-products-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all layout and styling.
Implement the website text primarily in Czech language (e.g., 'Produkty', 'O nás', 'Kontakt') as requested by the user.
Ensure all text over images is readable by using the specified gradient overlays. Do not use generic full-screen overlays; use directional gradients.
Implement the 'Technical Look' for product specifications - strict grids with 1px border-white/10.
Use Anton font for headings to match the high-performance 'Specialized.com' vibe. Do NOT use Inter for headings.
Main action buttons should be the Electric Orange (#FF5500).
Build the website as a modern React app with mobile-first responsiveness.
Include a 'History/About' section highlighting the 2010 origin.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for crisp, technical icons.
Do NOT use the default Shadcn 'Vercel' look. Customize borders to be sharp, backgrounds to be obsidian (#050505 or #121212), and use high-contrast accents.
